# Product Agent v0.1.3 Local Beta

This patch simplifies the home screen so first-time users see a focused Agent entry instead of local infrastructure details.

## Changes

- Removed the local health/status panel from the first screen.
- Removed the sample report preview from the first screen.
- Simplified the headline and supporting copy.
- Removed suggested material cards from the initial message.
- Kept the built-in demo entry as a light secondary action.
- Added an explicit mobile viewport and tightened mobile wrapping.
- Updated the README screenshot.

## Verify

```bash
pnpm typecheck
node scripts/local-doctor.mjs --json
pnpm build
```
